title: Cuneiform Tablet #0425: Hellenistic Mathematical
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Hellenistic period — a mathematical document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Hellenistic period — a mathematical document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Hellenistic period. Mathematical document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records mathematical matters typical of Hellenistic period administrative or literary practice.
